global.description: The ad features a prominent headline and body text with decorative game icons and a clear call-to-action button.
global.main_message: Encouraging new players to join the game with free rewards.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: StormByte UGC
elements.description: Bold, large text at the top of the ad, prominently displaying the brand name 'StormByte' with a modern font.

elements.label: Join the arena
elements.description: Medium-sized text centered below the headline, inviting users to join the game with a friendly tone.

elements.label: Game icons
elements.description: Four small game icons arranged in a grid pattern, each with a circular design and a light background.

elements.label: Game icons
elements.description: Another small game icon similar to the previous, positioned above the main text area.

elements.label: Game icons
elements.description: A small game icon positioned below the main text area, maintaining the same style as others.

elements.label: Game icons
elements.description: Another small game icon below the main text, consistent with the overall design.

elements.label: Shop now
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Shop now', inviting immediate action.

elements.label: Game icon
elements.description: A small circular game icon positioned near the center of the ad.

elements.label: Game icon
elements.description: A small circular game icon positioned at the top left corner of the ad.
